---
title: "Practice Activity 4: Emoji Riddles"
format: 
  html:
    code-tools: true
    toc: true      
execute: 
  error: true
  echo: true
  message: false
  warning: false

author: SOLUTIONS
embed-resources: true
---
```{r}
#| label: setup

library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(readxl)
```

## First Quarto Code Chunk!

```{r}
2 + 7
```

**This** code chunk adds two to *seven*.

## Crack the Code

```{r}
#| label: read-emojis

emoji_codes <- read_csv("../../data/04-magic-csv.csv")
```

```{r}
#| label: read-codes

kable(emoji_codes)
```

```{r}
emoji_clues <- read_xlsx("../../data/04-clue-data.xlsx",
                         sheet = "clues")
```

```{r}
str(emoji_clues)
```

```{r}
glimpse(emoji_clues)
```
```{r}
head(emoji_clues, n = 1)
```

```{r}
kable(emoji_clues)
```

:::callout-tip
# Canvas Submission
What do all of the answers to the riddles have in common?

☕️*COFFEE*☕️
:::
